name: volcano-agentic-plugins
description: Monorepo for Volcano plugins/extensions across agentic IDEs. Thin shells over the Volcano CLI with canonical content supplied by submodules or runtime fetches, never copied.

scripts.package:claude-desktop: npx --yes @anthropic-ai/mcpb validate plugins/claude-desktop/manifest.json && rm -f /tmp/volcano-claude-desktop.mcpb && npx --yes @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack plugins/claude-desktop /tmp/volcano-claude-desktop.mcpb
